page_content:
Formerly: EDCI407.

TLPL440 Foundations of Educating Multilingual Learners (3 Credits) Investigates historical, theoretical, and public policy issues and current practice in the field of education as it relates to multilingual learners (also known as English Language Learners, English Learners) in K-12 and other settings.

Credit Only Granted for. EDCI432 or TLPL440.
